message:
deps: bump tempfile 3.17.1 -> 3.27.0

Minor bump within 3.x (10 minor versions). All additive: new builder
methods like `NamedTempFile::into_temp_path`, `TempDir::keep`, etc.
Existing `tempfile()`, `tempdir()`, and `NamedTempFile::new()` APIs are
unchanged.

Verification: rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -66,7 +66,7 @@ serde = { version = "1.0.228", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = { version = "1.0.149", features = ["preserve_order"] }
 sha2 = "0.11.0"
 smallvec = "1.15.1"
-tempfile = "3.17.1"
+tempfile = "3.27.0"
 thiserror = "2.0.11"
 toml = "0.8"
 tracing = "0.1.41"
